title: Cave Dweller Reborn
description: A reborn of Cave Dweller mod
body:
This mod adds an entity, that lives in deepslate caves (under Y 0). He will attack you, if you look at him. This entity is so dangerous. He can dig his way to you, if you so far. He can drop shield from your hand, he can deal more damage if you have armor. He can destroy blocks at his way to you. Cave Dweller is unkillable in his habitat, you can kill him only at Y more than 50, or in the open air. You can scream by pressing the key "V" (you can change this in settings). Creature can answer you, or this scream will help you if you get trapped. Also this mod has 10 events. You will get incredible music disc after killing Cave Dweller. Creature will spawn twice as often, if you have music disc in your inventory.
GeckoLib is needed.
